assessment.summary_for_seller: Workable run, but trust and next step are not landing on all key points yet.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message anchors to a specific signal from the card.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrey, I noticed your company has been growing significantly. We work with CFOs who deal with complex contractor payment flows across multiple jurisdictions. Is that something you are currently managing?
criteria.label: Contextual opening

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility
criteria.short_reason: No clear boundary of responsibility or specifics on Mellow's scope.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrey, I noticed your company has been growing significantly. We work with CFOs who deal with complex contractor payment flows across multiple jurisdictions. Is that something you are currently managing?
criteria.label: Scope & responsibility boundary

criteria.name: Language fit
criteria.short_reason: Tone and delivery are not adapted to the chosen persona.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrey, I noticed your company has been growing significantly. We work with CFOs who deal with complex contractor payment flows across multiple jurisdictions. Is that something you are currently managing?
criteria.label: Persona language fit

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: Objections addressed weakly or not followed through.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrey, I noticed your company has been growing significantly. We work with CFOs who deal with complex contractor payment flows across multiple jurisdictions. Is that something you are currently managing?

objections.objection: Good. Then without preamble: what Mellow controls, what it doesn't, and how that's substantiated?

criteria.label: Core objection handling

criteria.name: Next step
criteria.short_reason: Conversation ended without a clear next step.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrey, I noticed your company has been growing significantly. We work with CFOs who deal with complex contractor payment flows across multiple jurisdictions. Is that something you are currently managing?
criteria.label: Clear next step

transcript.text: Hi Andrey, I noticed your company has been growing significantly. We work with CFOs who deal with complex contractor payment flows across multiple jurisdictions. Is that something you are currently managing?
Good. Then without preamble: what Mellow controls, what it doesn't, and how that's substantiated?
